Off Calendar Apr-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Appearances: Gilbert L. Purcell, Esq. of Brayton Purcell LLC, (415) 898-1555, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Andrea J. Casalett, Esq. of McKenna Long & Aldridge LLP (415) 267-4094, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: (1) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. (2) Motion for Summary Adjudication is denied as to the first and fourth causes of action for failure of defendant to shift burden. There exists a triable issue of material fact as to exposure/causation. Motion for Summary Adjudication is granted as to second and third causes of action. Plaintiffs to present evidence that Defendant produced the insulation. Motion for Summary Adjudication is granted regarding punitive damage claim. (Plaintiff's deposition and declaration are not contradictory in any material respect) this declaration does not constitute hearsay. Defendant's five evidentiary objections are overruled. So, too, are defendants three evidentiary objections to the Ay declaration. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302KOPP/PB)Judge: Quentin Kopp; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
